reference: Hello dear, I have gone through your question and understand your concern. It looks like a diaper rash; you can use antifungal cream and candid powder. It usually happens during heat waves. Try to give your baby an air bath, keeping her without underwear or diapers, just covering her with a cotton cloth. I hope this helps. If you have more questions, then don't hesitate to write to us. Wishing your baby good health.
text: Hello dear, I have gone through your question and understand your concern. It looks like a diaper rash. You can use antifungal cream and candid powder. It usually happens during heat waves. Try to give your baby an air bath, keeping her without underwear or diapers, just covering her with a cotton cloth. I hope this helps. If you have more questions, then don't hesitate to write to us. Wishing your baby good health.
